title: BIO 2026: Cell and gene therapy sector must break the mold to thrive
snippet: If cell and gene therapy makers are going to achieve their mission to improve patients’ lives, the industry must come together to share information across stakeholders, from regulators to manufacturers to payers.

title: Appendix in ulcerative colitis pathogenesis and therapy: An updated narrative review.
snippet: Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory disorder of the colon. Its pathogenesis has been linked to chronic intestinal inflammation stemming from genetic predisposition, immune dysregulation, changes in gut microbiome, and various environmental factors. There is emerging evidence for autophagy dysfunction in the UC setting, suggesting a compromise....
